LCC-HS10-L3-13001400-HSSCIENG910-MKT-GBL-02  |  HSSCIENG910  |  Engineering Design: Social, Cultural, and Environmental Impacts  |  MKT  |  GBL

Start with the Science

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1:
What are the students trying to decide?
2QUESTION 2:
Why does the boy want to lead with the environmental argument?
3QUESTION 3:
What does the boy suggest will happen when the environmental case is established first?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
